provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, stout elderly human woman of chinese descent who sells hot food from a cart on the docking level, wearing layers of warm clothing under a food-stained apron because the docking level is cold, thermal gloves with the fingertips cut off, a headscarf, station-issue flat shoes, a price board written in three languages hanging from her cart, she has been here longer than most of the station staff
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
